+【江湖】+【无系统】特种兵王赵辰穿越了成了定国候世子，一个文弱读书人，可惜刚来到大夏国父亲就被人设计战死沙场，母亲伤心欲绝而死，而世袭爵位又被二房窥视。看他如何摆脱困境，离开京城弃文从武，入住山庄赚取万千财富，训练特战府兵，控制汴河水道，练就天象境界武功，从而骑上青鬃马，拿起昆仑刀驰骋江湖，在朝廷中以武抗文，成为大夏第一世子………","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7fe71147d709caecaa2f9330e0d9014c","author":"午夜的雨","author_id":"","book_id":"7391787748320873497","book_name":"那年，那刀，那江湖，那庙堂","book_short_name":"武镇大夏朝","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e8e8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":273,\"name\":\"历史古代\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273\u0026name=历史古代\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":375,\"name\":\"特种兵\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=375\u0026name=特种兵\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":452,\"name\":\"架空\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452\u0026name=架空\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7395549266409685528","read_count":"16128","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3095584"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"1386","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,特种兵,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/371e9f457f33ad97069cf311c3bb03dd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779499971\u0026x-signature=r33%2BPXnP4LNTrgwClnUNoFnGmxM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1226685018543198","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"100"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2
